# Geographic Focus
Geo: Upstate South Carolina, Mauldin, Simpsonville, Fountain Inn, Gray Court, Laurens, Woodruff, Clinton, Ora, Joanna, Greenwood

# Content Guidance
Summary: Permitting-aware construction, residential additions, detached garages, ADUs, decks, porch enclosures. All content written by licensed SC general contractor.
